messages.content: ok so soomins bday is april 11. im thinking surprise party at kru. private dining room
kru is perfect she loves that place
Oh I love this idea! Count me in 👍
Good. I will pay for dinner.
byung u dont have to do that
so ive been looking at options. kru mikuni or binchoyaki
kru has a private dining room tho which would be perfect for the surprise
Kru gets my vote too! The private room would be perfect
alright kru it is. ill call tmrw
me soomin byung carson lorena plus jenna and mika flying in from LA so 8
yea her and mika. soomin hasnt seen them since the wedding basically
That is going to be such a great surprise!
called kru. private room available april 11. $150 deposit. booked it
confirmed with kru. were all set for april 11 7pm
update jenna sent her flight info. her and mika land smf april 10 at 5:45pm
nice they need a ride from teh airport?
lorena the cake is confirmed right
Yes! Mahoroba confirmed the custom mochi cake. Matcha and yuzu. Picking up April 11 at 3pm!
ok important. cover story for soomin is dental conference dinner at the hyatt on april 11
if she asks anyone about that night thats what were doing
final headcount check. everyone still good for the 11th?
ok its go time. everyone get to kru by 6:30 to set up before soomin arrives at 7
On my way! Got the cake in the car 🎂
yea theyre already at kru setting up
soomin thinks were heading to the hyatt. picking her up at 6:45
this is gonna be so good
hey john did you end up ordering that thing for your anniversary? almost mentioned it at brunch the other day lol
hey! got the flight info. u guys land at 5:45 on the 10th right?
yes!! southwest 2847 at 5:45pm. we are SO excited
cant wait to see soomins face omg
its gonna be great. u guys need a ride from smf?
no we rented a car! well check into the hotel and be ready for the 11th
perfect. dinner is at kru at 7pm. try to get there by 6:30 so were all set up before soomin arrives
what hotel should we stay at? somewhere close to the restaurant?
kimpton sawyer is like 10 min from kru. or the citizen hotel
also the cover story is dental conference dinner at the hyatt. just in case soomin texts u guys

Hi John! Welcome back to SCC. Just wanted to send you the rehearsal details. We meet Tuesdays, 7-9 PM at First United Methodist Church, 2101 L Street. Park in the lot off 21st and come through the side entrance.
The choir room is down the hall on the right. I'll save you a spot in the bass section!
awesome thanks! ill be there tmrw
hey thanks for tonight. felt good to be back
So glad you came! Your voice fit right in with the basses. See you next week.
Hi John, heads up we're starting the Lauridsen piece next week. Sheet music is in the email I sent this morning.
Concert tickets are on sale! Each member gets a 20% discount code. Check your email for the link.
nice thanks. can i buy extra for family?
Absolutely! The discount code works for up to 6 tickets.
Reminder: dress rehearsal Tuesday runs until 9:30. Concert Saturday, arrive by 5:30 PM.
John, reminder for our appointment today at 6 PM.
Good session today, John. See you next Thursday.
went to the first rehearsal tonight. nervous but okay
I'm glad you went. How did it feel?
weird at first but once we started singing it was fine
That sounds like a good first step. We can talk more Thursday.
rehearsal went well, the basses section is nice
Good. Are you finding it easier each week?
kinda. singing part is easy. the standing around talking part is harder
That makes sense. Small steps. See you Thursday.
John, reminder for Thursday at 6 PM.
still a little shaky in crowds but getting better
The fact that you keep going says a lot. How are you feeling overall?
better than january honestly. i actually look forward to it now
That's real progress, John. We'll discuss Thursday.
Thursday at 6 PM as usual, John.
hey the garden is actually helping
idk its grounding. hands in the dirt watching stuff grow
i dont think about work or anything
That sounds like a healthy pattern. We can explore this more Thursday.
John, reminder for Thursday at 6 PM.
thx. concert is next week. kinda nervous about that
We can talk about that Thursday. You've put in the work.
dude bonobo is coming to ace of spades march 28
oh hell yes. buying tickets now
got em. 2 GA, $137.90 total. u owe me half
drive up sunday morning camp 2 nights come back tues
i got the tent adn camp stove
ill bring the cooler and food
sold. ill book a campsite tmrw
dude the rubicon trail starts right there
6 miles along teh lake its sick
its 2 hrs to tahoe gotta set up camp before dark
cooler food sleeping bag extra blankets headlamp
bring ur garmin we gotta log the hike
hey man i need camera advice
soomins been wanting a real camera to take pics of hana
our anniversary is may 23 and i wanna get her a nice one
this is for the anniversary gift?
like 2k maybe more if its worth it
lemme look into it ill text u tmrw
ok so i did some research
dude the a7c ii is perfect for what soomin wants
full frame mirrorless super compact great autofocus
my buddy derek at work has one and the photos are insane
body only like 1800 but get teh kit with the 28-60mm lens
kit lens is actually decent to start with
thats more than i wanted to spend but whatever shes worth it
trust me she will lose her mind
the autofocus locks onto faces so its perfect for hana running around
mikes camera downtown on J street
ask for ray in thr mirrorless section hes solid
oh yea i know that place
she is gonna love it dude
yo did mikes call you yet? saw a firmware update dropped for the a7c ii too. soomins gonna flip
babe the hot water is barely warm again 😩
i literally cant shower in this
its like lukewarm at best. hana needs a bath tonight too
pls. this is the third time
i boiled water for the sink lol were basically camping
can u be home for it?
2 more days of lukewarm showers i can survive 😂
replaced the thermostat on the water heater
he says itll take a couple hours to fully heat up but should be good
the hot water is SO good now 😂
hana just had the best bath she didnt wanna get out 😊
no more boiling water on the stove like pioneers 💀
they did 3 total but she got a sticker after and forgot about it lol
dr chen said shes right on track developmentally
not surprised she never stops talking
oh also she said we can switch to 2% milk whenever
babe i need to show u something
ive been looking at standing desks for my wfh setup
my back is literally dying on tuesdays and thursdays 😩
electric sit stand with memory presets ✨
right?? and theres this monitor arm too
so i can adjust the screen height seperate from the desk
desk is $349 and the monitor arm is like $36
jenn from my team got one and she said it changed her life lol
my neck has been so stiff lately too
yea uve been complaining about that
yea u work from home twice a week its worth it
just ordered the desk and monitor arm!! 💕
hana just pointed at her arm and said ouchie 🥺
she was so brave tho getting her shots
dr chen said she did better than most kids her age
oh did u see the email from dr chens office
the growth chart and shot records
ya i saw. ill print the immunization record for little oaks
nice. when does the desk come
dont try to build it alone ill help this weekend
too late im already opening the box 😂
the desk goes up so smooth
monitor arm is perfect too everything is at eye level 😊
i stood for like 2 hours this morning and didnt even notice
hana keeps pressing the buttons to make it go up and down 😂
i dont blame her its so satisfying
ty i spent an hour on the cables lol
my zoom calls are gonna look so professional now~ 😊
babe did my dad text u about dinner tonight
something about a real estate agent??
can u come? 7 at his place
u should go tho take hana
i know but i cant keep skipping workouts
hana is wearing her strawberry dress 🍓
my dad says u work too much lol
he went on a whole thing about it 😂
the agent was nice tho. had some listings in natomas
hana fell asleep in the car 💕
ill carry her in when u get here
ty for carrying her in babe 😊
omg babe youre really doing this 😂
fresh basil tho… im not mad
dont let hana get to them lol
got a raised bed kit from home depot
ok just dont destroy the grass~
hana was trying to touch them this morning lol
babe have u ever been to the midtown farmers market
jenn from work was telling me about it
fresh produce local honey all kinds of stuff
we should take hana this saturday!! 🌸
theres flowers and everything she would love it 😊
ill add it to the calendar
ooh can we use it this weekend?? 🍝
not yet gotta let it get bigger
hana with her strawberry from yesterday
she wouldnt let go of it the whole time
i know i had to peel it out of her hand in the car lol
that market was so good tho
we need to make it a thing
the honey guy was so nice too
the one with all the samples?
yes!! the wildflower one was so good
we should get a jar next time
transplanted everything to the raised bed
babe we need to do something about the garage 😩
we cant even get to your music stuff without climbing over boxes. can we spring clean tomorrow?
yes! theres like 3 boxes of hanas old stuff we can donate too ☀️
hanas at my dads so we have all day
im dead but look how much we got done 😩
the garage looks so much better
3 bags for goodwill! we had a blender still in the box from our wedding registry 😂
lol how. ill drop the bags at goodwill this week
gotta water the garden before work now
want me to do it on the days you leave early?
i can actually see the floor now ✨
i can get to my studio setup now lol
got some good stuff at the market yesterday
that wildflower honey from our guy
wait tomato starts?? for the garden??
the lady said theyre perfect for sacramento
babe ur seriously becoming a farmer 😂
nah she was still asleep went early
she loves that strawberry stand tho 🍓
look what she made at daycare
this is the cutest thing ever
she was so proud of it at pickup
i cant believe shes doing crafts now
when did she get so big 😭
so were still good for canon tmrw right
u know my friend sarah? the photographer?
she offered to do family photos for us at capitol park!
the rose garden is gorgeous in may apparently ✨
right?? we dont have any good family photos since hana was like 3 months old 🥹
this is gonna be so cute 💕
she sent an email with all the details
hey babe, amy texted about a double date this saturday evening — her and kevin want to try that new italian place on R street. you free?
should hana wear the floral dress or the blue one?
right but the blue one matches better if we wear neutrals
that beige linen shirt with jeans
ur shirt is hanging in the closet
Hey Dr. C! Mrs. Patterson cancelled her 2pm. Want me to call the waitlist?
Hey Dr. C! Are you driving to the CE thing on the 22nd?
Should we carpool? No point taking two cars
What time should we leave? Registration starts at 7:30
lets leave by 7:15 its like 15 min from the office
Works for me! I'll meet you at the office
Did you see the agenda? Day 1 is infection control and OSHA
yea we need those infection control hours for the board
Same! I'm so behind on CE hours this year 😅
That OSHA section was so dry 😂
At least the lunch was decent
Yeah! She really knew her stuff
agreed the hands on part was solid
16 hours knocked out in one weekend 😊
yep good to have those done
Hey Dr. C! We want to do a birthday dinner for Rosa next Tuesday the 19th at 7. That new ramen place on J Street. Can you make it? Would mean a lot to her 😊
Dinner Tuesday. Important. New real estate agent joining.
ah i cant tonight i have gym
cant been slacking lately. soomin and hana will come tho
The agent specializes in East Sacramento.
sounds good ill let soomin know
John. Let's eat Thursday. New Korean place on Freeport Blvd. 6 o'clock. My treat.
hey man long time. you still in sac?
yeah man still here. hows LA
good good. we should link up when im up there next month
yo did u see dr okafor retired
omg derek just made partner at that SF practice
anyone going to CDA convention in march
did anyone else see that car break in on 25th last night
yeah saw the glass on the sidewalk this morning
this is the third one this month
im calling the non emergency line today
recycling schedule changed btw. every other week now starting march
hey team are we doing anything for dr phams retirement lunch
Ooh yes! Card and gift card? 👍
anyone hitting the parkway saturday morning

hey john amazon left a package at ur door just fyi
Hey John! Do you know if Soomin got my text? She hasnt responded in like 2 days lol
Nvm she just replied haha sorry!
hey choi carson said ur playing haggin oaks saturday?
lmk if u want to join 8am tee time

hey! saw soomins post with hana. shes getting so big!! how are you guys doing
